description: confirm_note_deletion on success emits make_note_deleted_snapshot which also uses empty_feed() (visibleNoteIds: []). After a successful deletion, the TS feedReducer receives a NoteFileDeleted snapshot with visibleNoteIds=[], which per PROP-FEED-007b sets state.visibleNoteIds = []. This means the entire feed list is cleared after every note deletion — remaining notes disappear from the UI. REQ-FEED-013 requires 'only the deleted note row is removed'; instead the implementation removes all rows. The same structural defect applies to make_deletion_failed_snapshot (feed.rs:183), which also uses empty_feed(), potentially clearing the feed on deletion failure. All three snapshot constructors (make_editing_state_changed_snapshot, make_note_deleted_snapshot, make_deletion_failed_snapshot) have this problem.
crossReference: specs/behavioral-spec.md REQ-FEED-013 — 'feed list removes only the deleted note's row'
specs/behavioral-spec.md REQ-FEED-021 — 'feed.visibleNoteIds carries the current application state at emit time'
